description: Move catalog for the VPG Engine. Each move is an attack, submission, taunt, or other action that can be assigned to slots in move-slots.json. A move's 'groups' field references group identifiers from move-slots.json — the move becomes eligible for every slot in any group it belongs to.

field_definitions.move_id: snake_case identifier. NOT globally unique — the same move_id may appear in different positions. The (move_id, position) pair is unique.
field_definitions.name: Display name shown in UI.
field_definitions.position: Broad area of the game system this move belongs to. Must match the position of every group the move references.
field_definitions.groups: Array of slot-group ids from move-slots.json. The move is eligible for every slot in every listed group.
field_definitions.power: Power grade S, A, B, C, D, E, F, G — or null if the move does no damage (taunts, evasion, etc.). S is highest, G is lowest.
field_definitions.ko: True if the move can knock out the opponent.
field_definitions.bleed: True if the move can cause the opponent to bleed.
field_definitions.feature: 'pin' if the move ends with a pin attempt, 'submit' if it ends with a submission attempt, or null for neither.
